## Summary

Describe the problem, the change and why this is the right scope.

## Evidence

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] additional validation attached when relevant

## Trade-offs

What did this change make larger, stricter or less flexible?

## Risk Review

- [ ] execution plane unchanged
- [ ] assurance plane updated consistently
- [ ] docs/specs updated when guarantees changed
- [ ] secrets and funded keys were not committed

## Rollout Notes

Deployment, migration, release or follow-up steps.
